title: pleurothallis stenoglossa
intro: Pleurothallis stenoglossa, also known as the small-tongued pleurothallis, is a species of orchid native to South America. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Pleurothallis stenoglossa include its ability to treat fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its potential to aid in wound healing. Herbal preparations of Pleurothallis stenoglossa include infusions and decoctions, which are often used to create teas and tinctures that can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
